hooks.command:
bash -c 'TEAMS=$HOME/.claude/teams; test -d $TEAMS || exit 0; for c in $TEAMS/*/config.json; do test -f $c || continue; p=${c%config.json}pid; test -f $p || continue; pid=$(cat $p 2>/dev/null); kill -0 $pid 2>/dev/null || printf "
WARNING: Stale Agent Team session.
Path: %s
Cleanup: rm -rf %s
" "${c%/config.json}" "${c%/config.json}" >&2; done'
